I 	asked: Are you ready to 	leap 	up to the big
leagues? 	You said 	YES. 	Congratulations!

The 	one-time-only

presented 	exclusively 	for 	AWAI 	members

From 	Dan 	Kenne~y
Dear Friend,
CONGRATULATIONS 	on your decision to kick your copywriting/freelancer business into
high gear with this dynamic program from AW AI. 	It 	took a lot 	of convincing and cajoling from Katie
before I agreed to make this material public. 	So, 	now 	that I have and you are in 	on 	it, 	don't 	waste
another minute 	of your time. 	You 	must leave the ranks 	of those who treat copywriting as art, as a
past-time, as a plaything, or even as a second or alternate career and join 	the few who treat it as a
BUSINESS. 	For 	the path to more clients, more easily obtained clients, better clients, better fees,
higher income, and more opportunity is 	NOT 	in working on your copywriting. 	It's 	in working on
your 	BUSINESS.
This letter will verify how you will be empowered 	by 	this Academy Home 	Study 	Program.
You 	will receive ...
Proven, powerful and 	little-understood 	CLIENT 	ATTRACTION 	METHODS
'
o 	Traditional and 	NON-Traditional and 	Hidden 	Sources 	of 	Clients
o 	How 	to 	"create" 	you 	own 	client 	"out 	of 	thin 	air"
o 	How 	to 	turn 	business owners 	not 	now using copywriters 	into 	clients
o 	How 	to 	create MAGNETIC STATUS 	for 	yourself, so 	clients 	come 	to 	you
o 	Where and 	how 	to 	create 	MAGNETIC 	VISIBILITY
o 	How 	to 	position 	yourself 	as 	MORE 	IMPORTANT 	than 	a
copywriter
o 	The 	two 	situations 	when 	taking 	on 	a 	client 	and 	project 	with 	NO
FEE, 	paid 	only 	on 	results, 	makes 	good 	sense 	- 	and 	how 	one 	of
those 	situations can be found 	right 	now, 	right 	where you live, and
turned 	into 	thousands 	or 	tens 	of 	thousands 	of 	dollars 	of 	cash in 	less
than 	30 days.
o 	Getting and keeping 	'the 	Milk 	Cow 	account' 	that 	pays 	the 	bills
o 	How 	to 	"leapfrog" 	and use 	"category 	of 	one 	tactical 	positioning"-
so you are 	target 	clients' 	only 	choice 	.
CLIENT 	MANAGEMENT 	METHODS 	that 	elevate you 	from 	"writer 	for 	hire", 	worker-
bee, service 	provider 	to 	Expert, Specialist, Trusted Advisor

copywriter): 	THE 	BIGGEST STATUS 	& 	INCOME 	BREAKTHROUGH

Layering 	•.• 	and 	Sequential 	Project 	Lock-In

Royalties, Performance/Results Bonuses, Royalty 	Buy-Outs, 	Licensing/Use
Fees, Use Renewal Fees 	(Note: 	differences 	between 	wealthy and 	poor folks: 	(1)
wealthy 	get 	paid 	before 	work, poor get 	paid 	after work; 	(2) 	wealthy get 	paid 	for 	who 	they
are, never just what they do; 	(:3) 	wealthy 	share 	in 	upside 	gains from 	their contributions,
poor 	never do.)

compensation 	(without 	resistance 	or 	stress) - 	3 	KEYS 	... 	and 	why 	you should
NEVER 	"do 	a 	proposal"

getting 	clients when you 	get 	the 	right 	clients in 	the 	first 	place, create 	growth
and expansion 	of 	need 	for 	your 	services, and keep 	them 	for 	life
o 	How 	to 	"mold" 	the 	copywriting 	assignment 	so 	YOU 	have 	the 	best 	chance 	of
producing 	a 	"WIN"- 	and 	how 	to 	avoid being 	stuck 	in a 	Can't-Win 	Situation.

have 	with 	Clients

distribution 	channels; under-utilized lists 	... 	how 	to 	AMAZE 	& 	ASTOUND

0 How 	to 	RETAIN 	~I.GHTS 	AND 	SYNDICATE 	YOUR 	WINNERS 	- 	take 	one
successful 	copywnt1ng 	project 	and 	license 	it 	to others
0 A~vanced 	Multiple-C~m~ens~tion 	Structures 	and 	Partnering 	With
Chent_s 	to,crea_te 	cont1n~1ng 	1ncome, 	share 	in 	upside, 	even 	share 	in
t~e 	che~t 	~ 	.e.xlt 	strategies 	and 	sale 	of 	his 	company 	(without 	taking on
nsks 	or 	l1ab1llt1es 	of 	business ownership)
You ' ll 	mast ~ r 	th~ 	Ksznn ~ dy 	Pow~r 	Triangks
o 	MESSAGE-MARKET-MEDIA 	is 	the 	basic 	Triangle
o 	PROJECT-PROPOSITION-PROFIT 	STRATEGY
o 	CLIENT 	ATTRACTION-COMPENSATION-EFFICACY 	is 	the 	business 	model
for 	the 	consultant/strategist/copywriter.
Five 	Ways 	This 	Academy 	Home 	Study 	Program
Is 	PROFOUNDLY 	DIFFERENT
Than 	Any 	Other 	Resources 	You've 	Every 	Invested 	In
1. 	It's 	being 	presented 	by 	a 	real 	7-Figure 	Income, 	working 	Copywriter.
2. 	Min e 	is 	a 	very 	unusual, 	untraditional, 	abnormal, 	contrarian 	approach
to 	the 	business 	of 	c opywriting.
3. 	This 	isn't 	a 	read 	it 	and 	put 	it 	on 	the 	bookshelf 	to 	father 	dust 	Program.
4. 	This 	isn't 	built 	for 	broad 	appeal 	to 	anybody 	who 	thinks 	they're 	a
copywriter 	- 	or 	is 	happy 	playing 	at 	it.
5. 	I 	stand 	up 	for 	what 	I 	have 	to 	say 	... 	with 	a
Clianoe 	• 	%ur 	• 	Life 	qV)I 	tE
I'm 	going 	to 	let 	you have 	the 	entire 	Program in 	your 	home 	for 	a 	full 	SIXTY 	DAYS,
to 	examine, 	get 	into, 	think 	about 	and decide 	whether 	or 	not 	you 	want 	to 	continue
using 	it. 	If 	you 	judge 	it 	unsatisfactory 	for 	any 	reason, 	you 	just 	ship 	it 	back 	to
AWAI 	and 	get 	an 	immediate 	refund 	of 	every 	penny 	paid- 	no 	questions, 	no
hassles. 	And 	if 	you 	really 	feel 	I 	misled 	you 	about 	this 	and 	wasted 	your 	time,
I'll 	also 	donate 	$250 	to 	any 	charity 	of 	your 	choice: 	just 	send me a 	brief 	note
explaining 	why 	you 	think 	I was 	misleading 	or 	unfair 	or 	full 	of 	bull 	or 	offensive 	or
whatever, 	name 	your 	charity, 	and 	I'll 	send 	'em 	$250 in 	your 	name.
I 	doubt very seriously that anyone 	else 	offering to boost your success as a freelance
copywriter has 	ever- 	or 	will 	ever- 	provide such a 	bold 	guarantee. 	This 	is 	how
certain 	I 	am that this Academy Home 	Study 	program can, 	in 	fact, change your
business 	life.
So, 	again, 	CONGRATULATIONS. 	And thank you; I appreciate your ambition and your
acceptance 	of the ideas I quickly presented, and your trust in me to 	"deliver 	the goods." I
guarantee, you 	won't 	be disappointed.
Sincerely,
DanS. 	Kennedy
